descriptionShort: TV and event listings page featuring Richmond Sockeyes at Kelowna in B.C. Junior Championship Series.
descriptionLong: Sports listings page from The Vancouver Sun dated March 21, 1987, covering hockey, soccer, football, and other sporting events. Includes B.C. Junior Championship Series matchup with Richmond leading Kelowna 3-0 in a best-of-nine final scheduled for 8:00 p.m., alongside NHL, Western League, and television broadcasts.
